name: Chicken and Rice Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the uncooked rice at the bottom of a 9x13 inch pan.
2. Season chicken pieces with salt and pepper.
3. Arrange the seasoned chicken pieces on top of the rice.
4. Sprinkle the onion soup mix evenly over the chicken.
5. Pour 2 cups of water over the top layer.
6. (Optional) Sprinkle green peppers over all.
7. Cover with foil.
8. Bake at 450°F for 20 minutes.
9. Reduce temperature to 350°F and bake for an additional hour.
